title: Axolotl Helmet
description: Transforms the Turtle Helmet into an axolotl helmet
body:
Overview:

Gives the Turtle Helmet a Axolotl redesign while keeping the vanilla style.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdbb90da8cdda91db58726f7673a90fa303c2713.jpeg)

Redesigns both the 2D item texture and the armor model.

![Overview Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f631f0b6e16806785935ed1662e261461f0453.jpeg)

Credit: Made by ErkedScreeN and McPaintingsKing

Feel free to use this in your modpacks!
